description: Japanese language pack — full Tier-1 (A1–A2). 320 vocabulary items, 75 core phrases, 25 grammar points (with substitution ladders), 20 pronunciation rules, 27 dialogues, 21 idioms (慣用句/ことわざ), 10 listening exercises, 10 writing prompts, 10 assessments, 5 roleplay scenarios. Every §10.1 MVP Seed Pack content category now meets or exceeds its Tier-1 volume target.
coverage: A1 everyday basics through early A2: greetings, self-introduction, numbers/money/time, days of the week, family, body, food/drink, colors, places, transport, household objects, weather, and a broad verb/adjective/adverb base. Grammar spans the core particles (は/が, を, に/で, の), です/ます, negation, past tense, か questions, plus the A2 backbone: the て-form and its family (～ています, ～てください, ～てもいい), ～たい, potential/できる, ～から, ～が/けど, comparatives (より/のほうが), 一番, ～ましょう, ～と思います, ～でしょう, and adjective→adverb formation. Listening/roleplay lessons are built on the dialogue set; writing prompts and assessments are self-contained. Deliberately excludes slang, keigo/formality levels, and profanity — Japanese's real register axis is politeness, not crudeness, and that deserves its own design pass rather than reusing the pt-br severity model as-is.
editorialNotes: Kanji/kana/romaji were authored directly (no machine translation pass). The pack grew from a 60-vocab pilot to full §10.1 Tier-1 volume across several passes (vocabulary/phrases/grammar/pronunciation, then dialogues, then idioms, then lessons/assessments) and should get a native speaker's sign-off before being treated as production-ready — particle choices, transitive/intransitive pairings, naturalness of example sentences, service-register phrasing, and pitch-accent notes in particular. See NATIVE_REVIEW.md.
